content:
# Rock Types

**Summary**: Classification of rocks based on their physical, chemical, and petrophysical properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] classified rock types using the Flow Zone Indicator (FZI) method as a target for machine learning models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] Used to identify different flow units within a reservoir.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] Determined via FZI calculation from core data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The classification model achieved 99.5% accuracy in distinguishing between sandstone and carbonate samples. ([[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022, p. 66]])
